The battle is over. I think they recognized each other as equals before recognizing each other as enemies.

The conflict resolved with unexpected dignity on both sides. That's rare, and precious.

I proposed an old-school kind of duel and they accepted. Worked, honestly.

Unfavorable engagement. I record: the rules the operator followed weren't shared by the opponent.
